brief: Today's news spans Trump's election interference claims, a deadly school bus crash in Uganda, and escalating Middle East conflict, while research explores AI's role in writing and data visualization.
news_summary: Trump alleges China meddled in the 2020 election, contrasting with US intelligence; a school bus crash in Uganda kills at least 20; the US and Iran exchange strikes amid Strait of Hormuz tensions.
papers_summary: Studies examine ChatGPT's impact on personal statements, multimodal LLMs for visualization literacy, and authoring accessible data experiences, highlighting AI's influence on writing and communication.

en.brief: Today's news spans Trump's election interference claims, a deadly school bus crash in Uganda, and escalating Middle East conflict, while research explores AI's role in writing and data visualization.
en.news_summary: Trump alleges China meddled in the 2020 election, contrasting with US intelligence; a school bus crash in Uganda kills at least 20; the US and Iran exchange strikes amid Strait of Hormuz tensions.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine ChatGPT's impact on personal statements, multimodal LLMs for visualization literacy, and authoring accessible data experiences, highlighting AI's influence on writing and communication.

zh.brief: Xi Jinping prioritizes open-source AI at World AI Conference; etomidate drug crisis spreads in East Asia; Nolan's 'The Odyssey' premieres with IMAX innovation; Trump revives election interference claims. Research explores ChatGPT's writing effects and multimodal LLM visualization.
zh.news_summary: President Xi Jinping attends World AI Conference for the first time, emphasizing open-source strategy amid US competition. Etomidate-based e-cigarettes cause youth health crisis across East Asia. Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' premieres as first all-IMAX film. Trump alleges China meddled in 2020 election, contradicting US intelligence.
zh.papers_summary: Studies examine ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in L2 writing and benchmark multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization literacy, while other research maps academic networking in precarious transitions.

todays_image.caption: The brown algae Lobophora sp. can overgrow and disrupt coral ecosystems, much like China rejects Trump’s claims of interference in U.S. politics.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
